message:
harden installer security, add ACFS_REF plumbing, and improve robustness

Security hardening (fail-closed):
- Remove ACFS_STRICT_MODE soft-fail fallbacks from install.sh; integrity
  check failures and manifest mismatches now always abort instead of
  silently continuing in "non-strict mode"
- Replace raw curl|bash Gemini CLI patching with verified checksum
  pipeline via new _agent_apply_verified_gemini_patch() in agents.sh
- Register gemini_patch in KNOWN_INSTALLERS (security.sh) and
  checksums.yaml with pinned SHA256
- Add normalizeGitRef() validator in userPreferences.ts to sanitize
  user-supplied git refs before interpolation into shell commands;
  rejects path traversal, leading dashes, .lock suffixes, etc.
- Widen checksums.yaml tool-name regex to accept hyphens and digits
  (e.g. gemini_patch, mcp_agent_mail) via [[:alnum:]_-]+ pattern
- Add gemini_patch and ru to required_tools list in checksum loader

ACFS_REF pinned-install support:
- Replace all hardcoded /main raw URLs with ${ACFS_REF:-main} across
  acfs.manifest.yaml, generated scripts (install_acfs.sh,
  install_filesystem.sh, install_shell.sh), and report.sh
- Update manifest_index.sh SHA256 to match regenerated manifest
- Web app: wire installMode through buildInstallCommand(), use
  normalizeGitRef for ref validation, show inline error on invalid ref,
  build installer URL with pinned ref path segment

Robustness improvements:
- ubuntu_upgrade.sh: fail-closed on missing upgrade_setup_infrastructure,
  missing acfs_source_dir, and failed state_update; force C locale on
  do-release-upgrade -c for stable parsing across locales
- install.sh run_ubuntu_upgrade_phase: refuse normal install during
  active upgrade stages (return 1 instead of 0); fail-closed on
  state_update and missing infrastructure
- gum_ui.sh: validate select choice before accepting; re-prompt on
  invalid input instead of silently returning empty string
- update.sh: add configurable ACFS_REPO_OWNER/ACFS_REPO_NAME/
  ACFS_CHECKSUMS_REF variables; add is_expected_acfs_origin_url() for
  strict origin remote validation; export CHECKSUMS_FILE when local
  copy exists; fix tmux command quoting to prevent word-splitting
- check-manifest-drift.sh: parse internal checksums via regex instead
  of sourcing the file (avoids arbitrary code execution from generated
  scripts); redirect bun generate stdout to stderr
- command-builder-panel.tsx: add clipboard copy failure handling with
  execCommand fallback; validate IP before using as effectiveIP;
  sanitize share URL by stripping existing query params; show ref
  validation error inline
- commandBuilder.ts: use ref-aware installer URL path; sanitize ref
  in share URL generation via normalizeGitRef

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

-                state_update ".ubuntu_upgrade.current_stage = \"not_started\" | .ubuntu_upgrade.enabled = false" || true

+                    log_error "Failed to clear pre_upgrade_reboot stage; aborting to prevent stale state."

+                fi
+            else
+                log_error "State tracking is unavailable; cannot continue upgrade safely."
+                return 1
             fi
             # Set flag to skip redundant warning (user already confirmed before reboot)

-                log_warn "Resume infrastructure not available. After reboot, re-run installer manually."
+            if [[ -z "$acfs_source_dir" ]] || ! type -t upgrade_setup_infrastructure &>/dev/null; then
+                log_error "Resume infrastructure is unavailable. Cannot safely auto-reboot."

+            fi
+            if ! upgrade_setup_infrastructure "$acfs_source_dir" "$@"; then
+                log_error "Failed to set up resume infrastructure. Cannot safely reboot."

@@ -47,6 +47,22 @@ done
 log() { $QUIET || echo "[manifest-drift] $*" >&2; }
 log_error() { echo "[manifest-drift] ERROR: $*" >&2; }
 
+INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS=()
+INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_VALUES=()
+
+parse_internal_checksums_file() {
+    local file="$1"
+    INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS=()
+    INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_VALUES=()
+
+    while IFS= read -r line; do
+        if [[ "$line" =~ ^[[:space:]]*\[([^]]+)\]=\"([0-9A-Fa-f]{64})\"[[:space:]]*$ ]]; then
+            INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS+=("${BASH_REMATCH[1]}")
+            INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_VALUES+=("${BASH_REMATCH[2],,}")
+        fi
+    done < "$file"
+}
+
 # Verify prerequisites
 MANIFEST="$REPO_ROOT/acfs.manifest.yaml"
 INDEX="$REPO_ROOT/scripts/generated/manifest_index.sh"
@@ -100,13 +116,12 @@ INTERNAL_DRIFT_FILES=()
 INTERNAL_CHECKED=0

-    # Source the checksums file to get ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS associative array
-    # shellcheck source=generated/internal_checksums.sh
-    source "$INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS_FILE"
+    parse_internal_checksums_file "$INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS_FILE"
 
-    if declare -p ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS &>/dev/null; then
-        for rel_path in "${!ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS[@]}"; do
-            expected="${ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS[$rel_path]}"
+    if [[ ${#INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
+        for i in "${!INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS[@]}"; do
+            rel_path="${INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS[$i]}"
+            expected="${INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_VALUES[$i]}"
             abs_path="$REPO_ROOT/$rel_path"
             if [[ -f "$abs_path" ]]; then
                 actual=$(sha256sum "$abs_path" | awk '{print $1}')
@@ -126,7 +141,7 @@ if [[ -f "$INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS_FILE" ]]; then

         log "Internal checksums: $INTERNAL_CHECKED checked, $INTERNAL_DRIFT_COUNT drifted"
     else
-        log "Warning: ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS not defined in $INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS_FILE"
+        log "Warning: No internal checksum entries parsed from $INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS_FILE"
     fi
 else
     log "Internal checksums file not found (pre-migration), skipping"

-    for rel_path in "${!ACFS_INTERNAL_CHECKSUMS[@]}"; do

+    for i in "${!INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_PATHS[@]}"; do

+        expected="${INTERNAL_CHECKSUM_VALUES[$i]}"
         abs_path="$REPO_ROOT/$rel_path"

             actual=$(sha256sum "$abs_path" | awk '{print $1}')

+    local patch_tool="gemini_patch"

+    local patch_sha=""
+
+    if [[ -f "$AGENTS_SCRIPT_DIR/security.sh" ]]; then
+        # shellcheck source=security.sh
+        source "$AGENTS_SCRIPT_DIR/security.sh"
+        if load_checksums; then
+            patch_url="${KNOWN_INSTALLERS[$patch_tool]:-$patch_url}"
+            patch_sha="$(get_checksum "$patch_tool")"
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    if [[ -z "$patch_sha" ]]; then
+        log_warn "Gemini patch checksum unavailable; skipping patch for safety"
+        return 1
+    fi
+
+    if _agent_run_as_user "source '$AGENTS_SCRIPT_DIR/security.sh'; verify_checksum '$patch_url' '$patch_sha' '$patch_tool' | bash -s --"; then
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    log_warn "Gemini patch verification failed; skipping patch"
+    return 1
+}
+
